# Issue Tracker Configuration
# Generated by setup-matt-pocock-skills

**Tracker**: GitHub Issues — `fangtaocai041/san-sheng-wanwu-core`
**PRs as request surface**: No

## Usage

Issues are created and managed via the `gh` CLI tool. Skills like `to-issues`, `triage`, `to-prd`, and `qa` read from and write to GitHub Issues using standard `gh issue` commands.

## Commands
```bash
gh issue list -R fangtaocai041/san-sheng-wanwu-core
gh issue create -R fangtaocai041/san-sheng-wanwu-core -t "Title" -b "Body" -l "label"
```
